name: Critical OpenSSL vulnerability in production container
description: OpenSSL is vulnerable to a denial of service via malformed PKCS12 files. Processing crafted PKCS12 data can crash the application.

name: SQL injection in pg driver
description: PostgreSQL JDBC driver is vulnerable to SQL injection via the preferQueryMode=simple connection parameter.

name: Path traversal in Spring Framework
description: Spring Framework is vulnerable to path traversal via UriComponentsBuilder when the URI contains path segments with encoded dots.
